hook: Awe can actually lower inflammation in your body.

script.hook: Did you know that experiencing awe can have real health benefits?
beats: Research shows that awe reduces levels of IL-6, an inflammatory marker linked to chronic disease.
Awe activates the vagus nerve, which helps lower stress hormones and inflammation.
To cultivate awe, try spending time in nature or stargazing—these experiences can enhance your wellbeing.
script.close: Follow BestKarma for science-backed health without the hype.

visualPlan: Visual of a stunning natural landscape to evoke awe.
